_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of organization issues, objectives, and operations in cyber as well as regulations and policy directives governing cyber operations.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of regulatory enforcement mechanisms, including supervisory authority powers, penalty structures, precedent enforcement actions, and the distinction between binding requirements, regulatory guidance, and industry codes of conduct.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI RC domain. RC-K-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-K-006 (SP, cosine: 0.543), DG-K-008 (DG, cosine: 0.512).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.3/10 (raw 0.332). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [cyber, directives, governing, issues, objectives, operations] vs WIDAI-only terms [actions, authority, binding, codes, conduct, distinction] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.879 (P=0.887, R=0.872). Balanced P/R — the 19-word DCWF element and 27-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.0%). "Knowledge of organization issues, objectives, and operations in cyber as well as" and "Knowledge of regulatory enforcement mechanisms, including supervisory authority" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.551 > STS 0.332 (gap +0.219). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.6%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [cyber, directives, governing, issues, objectives, operations]. WIDAI-only: [actions, authority, binding, codes, conduct, distinction].
